NAVAREA XIX 154/25

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  210630 UTC NOV 25
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
  
 71-21.30N 022-23.00E COSL PROSPECTOR
 66-00.10N 007-47.90E SCARABEO 8
 65-24.70N 007-23.80E COSL INNOVATOR
 65-08.60N 007-25.90E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　153/25
